# LuxeForge Studio

LuxeForge Studio is a premium digital studio based in Kota, Rajasthan, India.

## What we build

- Premium business websites
- Website development in Kota
- Website development in Jaipur
- Restaurant POS software
- QR ordering systems for cafes and restaurants
- Admin dashboards and CRM panels
- VPS-ready custom software
- CafeLuxe POS Suite
- CafeLuxe QR Ordering
- CafeLuxe Staff App

## Service areas

- Kota
- Jaipur
- Rajasthan
- India

## Target customers

LuxeForge Studio works with cafes, restaurants, cloud kitchens, local shops, service businesses and growing companies that need premium websites, lead capture systems, restaurant technology or custom business software.

## Product ecosystem

CafeLuxe is the restaurant technology product ecosystem by LuxeForge Studio. It includes POS, billing, KOT, QR ordering, staff-side operations, records, reports and printer-ready workflows.
